mapper.insert: INSERT INTO batch_orders (stock_code, exchange, side, round_id, pricing_method, net_fractional_qty, whole_qty, ls_order_id, ls_exec_id, status, fill_price, sent_at, filled_at) VALUES (#{stockCode}, #{exchange}, #{side}, #{roundId}, #{pricingMethod}, #{netFractionalQty}, #{wholeQty}, #{lsOrderId}, #{lsExecId}, #{status}, #{fillPrice}, #{sentAt}, #{filledAt})
